CC=clang CXX=clang++ CFLAGS_FOR_BUILD="-O2 -std=gnu99" CXXFLAGS_FOR_BUILD="-O2 -std=gnu++11 -fbracket-depth=512" CPPFLAGS_FOR_TARGET="-I/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/include/aarch64-linux-android" ../gcc-6.1.0/configure --prefix=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local --target=aarch64-linux-android --program-suffix=-6.1 --with-gmp=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --with-mpc=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --with-mpfr=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --with-system-zlib --disable-nls --disable-bootstrap --disable-multilib --disable-lto --disable-tls --with-arch=armv8-a --enable-default-pie --enable-host-shared --enable-__cxa_atexit --enable-link-mutex --enable-gnu-indirect-function --with-stage1-ldflags="-L/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/aarch64-linux-android/lib" --with-boot-ldflags="-specs=/data/data/com.termux/files/home/sources/termux-packages/scripts/termux.spec -static-libstdc++ -static-libgcc" --with-sysroot=/data/data/com.termux/files --with-build-time-tools=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local/aarch64-linux-android/bin --with-local-prefix=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local --with-native-system-header-dir=/usr/include --with-ld=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local/aarch64-linux-android/bin/ld --with-as=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local/aarch64-linux-android/bin/as --enable-version-specific-runtime-libs --enable-languages=c,c++
